data.title: Ray Dalio doubts central banks will use Bitcoin as reserve currency due to lack of privacy. He has some Bitcoin in portfolio.
data.description: Billionaire hedge fund manager Ray Dalio expressed skepticism about central banks holding Bitcoin as a reserve currency due to privacy concerns. Dalio shared an older clip discussing Bitcoin's role as money, stating doubts about central banks adopting it due to public transactions and the risk of government control. He mentioned having some Bitcoin in his portfolio but not much, acknowledging its potential as an alternative money. The full article is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Mitsubishi Electric wins 28th R&D 100 Award for SynTRACS railcar system, featuring first-ever synchronous reluctance motor.
data.description: Tokyo-based Mitsubishi Electric Corporation has been granted the 2025 R&D 100 Award by U.S. publication R&D World for their innovative SynTRACS system designed for railcars. This accolade marks the 28th award the corporation has received so far. The state-of-the-art system features a synchronous reluctance motor (SynRM), a breakthrough in the railway industry aimed at conserving energy and resources. Mitsubishi Electric Corporation's SynTRACS is a cutting-edge solution that promises significant efficiency improvements for railcars.

data.title: Techo International Airport in Phnom Penh opened on Sept. 9, 2025, as the largest aviation project in Cambodia.
data.description: In the capital city of Phnom Penh in Cambodia, a significant event took place on September 9, 2025, marking a historic achievement as Techo International Airport (with IATA code KTI and ICAO code VDTI) was inaugurated. This airport stands as the largest aviation infrastructure project in the nation, funded and constructed by Cambodian authorities. This development signifies a major step forward for the country's transportation sector, with impressive numbers in terms of investment and scale.

data.title: Advantech (TWSE: 2395) teams up with Edge Impulse to enhance Edge AI development, aiming for innovative solutions.
data.description: Taipei, Taiwan, on October 2, 2025 - Advantech, a prominent player in IoT intelligent systems and embedded platforms listed on the Taiwan Stock Exchange as 2395, will be collaborating strategically with Edge Impulse Inc. This entity, a subsidiary of Qualcomm and a key provider of cutting-edge AI development platforms intended for edge AI applications, will be joining forces with Advantech as per recent announcements.

data.title: Bitcoin surpasses $121,000; Ethereum, Dogecoin, XRP also rise. Analytic firm predicts BTC hitting $130,000. Greed sentiment in market.
data.description: Cryptocurrencies and stocks surged despite government shutdown concerns. Bitcoin rose by +1.30% to $120,125.23, nearing its all-time high, while Ethereum climbed +2.55% to $4,468.61. XRP increased by +1.98% to $3.01, Solana jumped +4.82% to $231.39, and Dogecoin saw a +4.47% rise to $0.2590. Bitcoin's rally continued, nearing its all-time high with JPMorgan analysts raising their year-end target to $165,000. Ethereum hit $4,500 before settling at $4,700. Over $393 million in cryptocurrency liquidations occurred, with $274 million in bearish shorts extinguished. Bitcoin shorts worth $435 million were at risk if prices surged to $123,000. Bitcoin's open interest rose by 3.02%, indicating fresh capital inflow into derivatives markets. Greed sentiment prevailed in the crypto market.

data.title: Dow Jones, S&P 500, and Nasdaq hit all-time highs. Tesla disappoints despite record deliveries.
data.description: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq have reached new record highs. Broadcom showed a buy signal amidst a surge in hot stocks. Tesla experienced a decline despite achieving record deliveries. Dow Jones Futures are on the rise following a rally in high-performing stocks.
